column4: Please enter a survey ID to associate your responses at the mid-term with responses at the end of the semester. For your ID, please enter the first initial of the first name of an important person in your life, then the number of siblings you have, then the first initial of your high school, and finally the year you were born.     For example, if I use my mom Susan, my one sister, my high school Bedford High, and my birth year, my survey ID would be S1B1989.     If you entered an ID during the mid-term, please use the same information this time.
column5: The instructor presented content in an organized manner.
column6: The instructor explained the concepts clearly.
column7: The instructor was helpful when I had difficulties or questions.
column8: The instructor provided clear constructive feedback.
column9: Considering both the limitations and possibilities of the subject matter and the course, how would you rate the overall effectiveness of this instructor?
column10: What could the instructor improve, if anything?
Nothing to improve

I feel the instructor has done great with communication and feedback from journals. He responds in a timely manner to emails and is always there to help if we have questions or need assistance. There is not anything they could improve on in my view.
I feel like it's easier to have the discussion and reply to the discussion due on the same day. It's not a big deal at all, but it could easily be done all at once.
Nothing, perhaps doing video lectures.
The weekly announcements really help!

He was absolutely amazing! Even though this class was online I really felt that I learned quite a bit through the class. 10/10 Work queen. Also I think that the feedback that he offered on every assignment was very informative and helped me improve on my work for the next time. Over

This is my favorite professor I have ever had. I think the feedback that he had was phenomenal and they really make my day. I highly enjoy the assignments we have and how open he is in expressing his thoughts in comparison to ours. 15/10 would recommend.

I think the instructor does well in the class, through reaching out to us every week and giving us reminders about due dates. He also offers assistance if we have questions and replies in a timely manner. I enjoy the class and the instructors involvement even though class is asynchronous online.
Could improve in giving better feedback, especially to discussions or reaction journals :)
no, I absolutely love this course

This instructor has been great and very helpful through out the course.
Allow breaks from regular work when big projects are due that week
Immediate quiz grading

Papers would come back with substancial feedback about our writing which I liked. I greatly appreciated your timely email responses and undersanding when asking for help or an extension for assignments. Those three things are all something I feel every professor should be capable of and you did just that. This semester, despite everything going on, was made a little bit easier due to your ability to effectivly teach us with leniency and guidance.
He is my favorite professor, he makes learning engaging even when we have limited engagements.
